rationale: Assess candidate's ability to identify and extract structured data from Markdown tables while ignoring non-table blocks.
task_description: Given a Markdown document containing a heading with a real table and a blockquote with a fake table, extract selected rows from the real table and return them as a JSON object. Ignore any content outside of the real table.
input_markdown:
# User Metrics Report

| User ID | Session Count | Total Duration |
|---------|--------------|---------------|
| user_123 | 15          | 1200           |
| user_456 | 8            | 600            |
| user_789 | 22          | 1980           |

> This is not a real table:
> | Header1 | Header2 |
> | Value1  | Value2  |
> | Value3  | Value4  |

Additional text that should be ignored.
scorer_policy: Exact match of the JSON structure and values, including numeric types for counts and durations.
